args.Description: "Update onClick call to handleRequestDiscTest in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Pass fullApp object instead of separate ID/phone to handleRequestDiscTest in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.ReplacementContent:
"                                            <button
                                              onClick={() => handleRequestDiscTest(fullApp)}
                                              className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 py-2 px-3 bg-indigo-50 hover:bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 rounded-xl font-black text-[9px] uppercase tracking-widest transition-all border border-indigo-100/50 hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95 shadow-sm"
                                              title="Solicitar teste DISC para este candidato"
                                            >
                                              <Brain size={12} /> Solicitar Teste DISC
                                            </button>"
args.TargetContent:

                                              title="Solicitar teste DISC para este candidato"
